description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth white buttercream exterior, adorned with colorful confetti sprinkles around the lower half. The top of the cake features eight evenly spaced swirls of white icing, each topped with a lit birthday candle in various colors and patterns. The cake sits on a gold, scalloped-edge cardboard tray, which provides a festive and sturdy base. The overall appearance is celebratory and classic, suitable for birthdays or similar occasions. The cake's surface is soft and matte, with a gentle sheen from the icing. The interior is likely composed of a light, spongy cake base beneath the icing.
description: A round, white buttercream cake with colorful sprinkles, eight icing swirls, and lit birthday candles, displayed on a gold tray. The cake has a festive, classic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake's white icing, colorful sprinkles, and four visible candles with swirls.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the cake's right side, with all eight candles and swirls visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back candles and sprinkles, similar to the front but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Left-side view, showing the cake's leftmost candles and the gold tray edge, with sprinkles visible around the base.
